name: penfolio
description: PenFolio — a self-hosted CV / cover-letter builder with a built-in job tracker. A FlowCV-inspired, open-source platform.
author: Jeff Nasseri <sir.jeff.nasseri@gmail.com>

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix apps/api && npm install --prefix apps/web
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/api run build && npm --prefix apps/web run build
